# 🖥️ Biwenger Tools Web App

The web application for Biwenger Tools. Provides an interface for visualising all the announcements and data collected by the Scraper Job.

## 🚀 Key Features

* **Data visualisation**: Interactively displays league announcement data from your Biwenger league.
* **Data sync**: Connects to the CSV files generated by the scraper to show the latest data.

## ⚙️ Configuration and Usage

For detailed setup instructions, see the main operations document.

* **Installation and dependencies**: See section **`1.1 Web App`** in `operations.md`.
* **Running and deploying**: Local execution and GCP deployment commands are in `operations.md` **`2.1 Web App`**.

## ⚠️ Notes

* **Production access**: Once deployed, the web app is available at the URL provided by the Google Cloud service.
https://biwenger-summary-pjpqofuevq-no.a.run.app/
